title: ageratina occidentalis
intro: Ageratina occidentalis, also known as western mountain mint, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of western mountain mint include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and cramps, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Western mountain mint can be prepared for medicinal use through teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health problems.
